title: Add native GlobTool (parity with CC tools/GlobTool/GlobTool.ts)
description:
## Summary

OpenClaudia currently has no native glob tool. File discovery falls through to bash. Claude Code has a dedicated GlobTool at `tools/GlobTool/GlobTool.ts` (198 lines) that accepts a `pattern` (required) and optional `path` parameter and returns a list of matching file paths (capped at 100 results, with a `truncated` flag).

## CC Reference

- CC source: `tools/GlobTool/GlobTool.ts:1-198`
- Output schema: `{ durationMs, numFiles, filenames: string[], truncated: bool }`
- Permissions: uses `checkReadPermissionForTool`

## Gap

OC: missing — no `src/tools/file/glob.rs` or equivalent. File pattern search requires invoking bash.

## Parent Spec Issue

Filed from issue #525 (Phase 1 spec: tools — file operations).
